given: Form submission succeeds and record is saved
when: The server returns a successful save response
then: User sees a confirmation message indicating the stock record was successfully saved
architectural_notes: Asserts the post-save UI feedback view, so the outermost boundary is the browser; E2E. Owner module: client confirmation view rendered from the app/routes/stock.py boundary response. Cross-cutting: the no-silent-failure feedback contract (design brief) lives at the boundary/UI; no domain logic. Verified through the same real-branch flow as AC2.
